metadata.name: WordPress Core Knowledge - Gotchas
metadata.description: Tests knowledge of common WordPress pitfalls and edge cases

tests.prompt: What does get_post_meta($post_id, 'missing_key', true) return when the meta key does not exist?
tests.explanation: With $single=true and no row present, get_post_meta returns an empty string—easy to misread as a real value with loose checks.
